name: Celestial Contact
short_description: Experience Celestial Contact, a captivating fusion of shooter and rogue-lite genres set in a mysterious arena adorned with beautiful 2D pixel art. Battle through waves of enemies, gather gear, conquer bosses, and enhance your character to strive for the highest score and lasting survival!
detailed_description:
Dare to a real challenge?

ATTENTION!
This game may test your skills and patience with its challenging core game mechanics!

Celestial Contact is the perfect blend of shooter and rogue-lite genre in an arena where you journey through an atmosphere of mystery and suspense shaped by stunning 2D pixel art.
Featuring an immersive atmosphere and a compelling soundtrack, you'll fight for survival by clearing an alien-robot invasion in this challenging game!
Clear waves of enemies, collect GEAR, defeat BOSSes and upgrade your character. Aim for the highest score by lasting the longest! Who knows, maybe you'll clear the station of enemies forever!

  • Use the Gears you collect throughout the game to buy character and weapon upgrades in the store.

  • Experience different gameplay experiences by upgrading different costumes and weapons that give you different positive and negative traits!

  • Get support from Pax to collect items dropped by enemies! If Luke is close enough to the dropped items, Pax automatically picks them up.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Turkish
